title: Worker Receipt (adapter-agnostic)
description: Imported via WorkerReceiptImported. Receipt != acceptance. Identical schema/terms regardless of which adapter ran (S-6). Worker self-reports are recorded but NOT trusted as the gate; the deterministic Predicate re-derives/re-runs.

capsule_id.description: binds the receipt to its capsule

worktree_path.description: the isolated Macro worktree the candidate was built in

tree_oid.description: Macro Git tree OID — the anchor predicate P7 binds against (ANCHOR_BINDS_HASH)

files_touched.description: paths the candidate changed (checked against capsule scope, P3)

declared_test_results.description: worker self-reported test results (recorded for audit; predicate P6 RE-RUNS, never trusts these)
